name: kamae-model-translator
description: Kamae cross-language model porting and service interoperability skills

interface.shortDescription: Cross-language domain porting and service interop
interface.longDescription: Port kamae domain models between TypeScript, Python, Rust, and Scala while preserving type safety and invariants, and define wire-format contracts for exchanging models between polyglot services.
defaultPrompt: Use $kamae-model-port to port this domain model to another kamae language.
Use $kamae-model-bridge to define the wire format for events between these polyglot services.
